desc: Blurred '0' big-counter materializes dead-center, snaps into focus over 6f then rolls up into the stat scene; LIGHT pastel-mesh + grid.
'61,800' multi-tone L-R gradient numeral + rotating dashed-circle ring + confetti dots; kicker '> STARS ON GITHUB', sub '★ STARS · PAPERCLIP ON GITHUB'.
Two white logo compare-cards (OpenAI / Google G) rise + fade together; floating squares. LIGHT mesh.
'Already powering real businesses.' ('real' periwinkle) + 3 stacked status chips (MIT LICENSED / OPEN SOURCE / 61.8K STARS) pop in top-down.
'People are spinning up whole companies on it.' + trio of labeled bottom cards (Halcyon Studio / Atlas Foundry / Meridian Labs) slide up L-R.
Large white browser window with traffic-light dots, crumb 'paperclip > ai', serif 'Paperclip' wordmark cross-fades in; rises + scales.
Browser chassis persists; status pills clip-reveal above (CEO AGENT SPAWNED / HIRING ROSTER), inner screenshot cross-dissolves (node graph -> roster -> dashboard), bottom info-cards slide up.
Claude Code + agent-stack walkthrough; top pill appends agent chips (Claude Code -> Codex -> Cursor), dark IDE/analytics dashboard inside window, 3 stat info-cards rise.
Manifesto: 'This isn't vibe-coding a chatbot.' ('vibe-coding' lavender) + mono sub 'THIS IS AN ORG.'; strong center mesh glow swells.
'Run a whole company from your phone.' ('phone.' periwinkle) word-by-word; dark iPhone lists CEO/Engineers/Marketing/Copy rows populating top-down.
'Comment' + giant gradient "AI" (violet->blue) + 'and I'll DM the GitHub repo.' + handle pill '@abhishek.devini'.
Intro spark: orange asterisk/burst spark glyph draws/fades center with peach radial bloom; kicker '01 / WATCH' clip-reveals. LIGHT warm-orange mesh.
'Claude now watches video. Frame by frame.' ('Frame'/'frame.' orange) + kinetic subtitle with pink strikethrough on 'transcript' -> 'actual visuals' orange + 'both' pill.
'03 / RUN IT — Type. Paste. Watch.'; LIGHT glassy terminal card, traffic dots + crumb '~/claude-projects', green '$' + orange '/claude-watch' typing-on with blinking caret + 'ENTER' pill.
'04 / RESULT'; dark result panel 'Key Concepts' bulleted list with inline orange [t=02:26] code-pills; floating stat tokens '30 min' (pink) / '2 min' (teal) above.
'05 / DECODE — Every top creator. Decoded.'; 3 video-thumbnail cards (@mrbeast/@garrytan/@aliabdaal) + tag pills + curved connector lines drawing down to OBSIDIAN VAULT node.
'06 / BRAIN — Second brain. On autopilot.' ('autopilot.' orange); ~7 periwinkle node dots pop into a loose ring/graph with connecting edges drawing.
'07 / TUTORIAL'; peach glassy card with YouTube red play-tile, 'Full tutorial on YouTube.' + '@DeviniLabs' + 'LINK IN PROFILE' CTA pill.
'08 / UNDER THE HOOD — Images + text. That's all Claude needs.'; LEFT 3x3 color grid labeled IMAGES, RIGHT dark terminal text block labeled TEXT, cross-fade from dark placeholder squares.
'09 / YT-DLP — Pull from anywhere.' ('anywhere.' teal); '$ yt-dlp https://...' command pill with blinking caret + app-icon grid (YouTube/Loom/Instagram/+more) popping in.
'10 / EXTRACT'; dark spark/diamond glyph whip-rotates into center with heavy motion-blur then settles; mesh blobs swell warm.
'11 / TRANSCRIBE — Transcribe.'; wide glassy pill with periwinkle audio waveform bars animating a travelling left-right wave.
'12 / SYNC — Claude reads. Claude watches. Same time.'; video card (left, burnt-in caption) + Claude badge (right) + 'CLAUDE SEES' caption bar + timeline scrubber with active 00:42 orange.
'13 / LOCAL — Runs on your machine.' ('your' orange); two outlined VS cards: teal 'LOCAL / your machine' + pink '$0 NO API / no monthly bills', borders draw on.
'14 / GET IT'; 'Comment' + 'AI' orange + wide glassy search/input bar with orange dot, blinking caret, orange send button.
Blank warm-paper grid holds ~1s with faint vignette breathing before first mockup rises. PAPER-GRID mode #DDD8D5.
Top kinetic subtitle 'This whole 3D site? 1 hour.' ('1 hour.' orange) pinned top; 3D-perspective-tilted dark-chassis browser showing 3D statue/debris scene; dark chip 'start to ship · 55 minutes'.

'One custom skill handles it all' ('custom skill' orange); tilted browser cross-swaps Devini product page -> mountain hero site; dark command chip '/3d-website-builder · CUSTOM' + slow parallax drift.
Tilted window shows full 'Let's Build Something Exceptional' mountain landing page; dark build-status chip swaps text inside.
'I just asked.' ('asked.' orange) pinned top; pixel-art 'DEVINI / BUILD WITH' retro game site; dark-green chat bubble 'YOU -> CLAUDE / build me' slides up from bottom edge.
'And it just did it.' pinned top; window cross-dissolves pixel-site -> finished 3D white-bust statue site; 4 dark-green chat status pills stack bottom-to-top with checkmarks.
'And none of the usual mess' pinned top; two anti-pain dark chips; orange spark rounded-square tile (white asterisk) whip-scales in over the mockup as scene collapses to logo.

Orange spark tile with orbiting ellipse ring + idle bob; 'One skill. Whole pipeline.'; 4 dark pipeline chips (ASSETS·CODE·SCENE·SHIP) pop L-R + flow line 'asset -> code -> scene -> shipped' ('shipped' green).
Spark tile shrinks to top; 'Comment "AI" for the full setup'; dark-green chat input pill 'you · just now / AI|' with blinking caret + send glyph; micro-cta 'RUNNING TONIGHT · GUARANTEED'.
'98%'->'99%' count-up, orange digits + white '%', orange glow halo; sub 'of Claude users have / no idea this exists' + dot-grid viz (rows of dots, one orange-lit). DARK. CLEANEST dot-grid big-stat.
'I gave Claude infinite memory'; Claude app icon + infinity glyph (orange->blue gradient) icon-pair, green cost-pill 'COST · 1,370 tokens'.
'Every new chat starts from zero.' (red, left-aligned); 3 stacked dark chat-rows with red 'No prior context found.' responses; footer bar 'TOKENS BURNING · 0' (red). Negative framing.
'A second brain that never forgets.' (blue); two glowing icon discs: orange brain 'REASONING' + blue network 'MEMORY', connecting lines draw between.
'Plus — all free, in NotebookLM.' ('in NotebookLM.' blue), left-aligned; holds alone ~2s before cards.
3 feature cards under shrunk headline: Infographics (yellow FREE), Cinematic video (orange FREE), Deep research (blue FREE); stagger-rise with FREE tags popping.
'wrap-up skill.'; flow row SESSION -> animated '>' arrow -> NotebookLM logo + green '+ SAVED' pill; cascade-fade top-down.
'Claude pulls only what it needs.' (yellow); search bar '🔍 how did we structure that auth flow?' + memory cell-grid matrix (6x4) with 4 cells lighting up, 'MATCHES · 4' counter.
'One setup. Changes everything.' with 'everything.' in animated orange->yellow->grey->blue gradient + gradient underline wiping in.
'Want the exact steps? I'LL SEND THEM OVER.'; 3 engagement cards (Like red / Follow blue / Comment yellow-highlighted); footer 'I'LL DM THE FULL SETUP'.
Anthropic intro: pill '● QUIETLY LAUNCHED' + Anthropic logo mark + 'Anthropic' wordmark; orange radial glow blooms. DARK.
'Claude / Dispatch' ('Dispatch' orange glowing); eyebrow 'just dropped a feature that' + kinetic bottom subtitle. Lockup persists top.
'Text it. Walk away.'; iPhone mockup (left, orange chat bubbles) + green-tinted terminal card (right, dispatch --run log) joined by dashed orange->green curve with a green dot traveling along it.
Large cream card #E1D7C8 with '● LIVE · DISPATCH' pill + serif quote 'Like when the deck is on your laptop, but you aren't'; below: dark list rows (Grabbing coffee / Fix bugs in my code).
'People tried this before.'; glowing orange ring spotlight containing red OpenClaw mascot, label 'OPENCLAW'; kinetic subtitle 'It had serious issues.'
'Three deal-breakers.'; 3 orange-bordered problem cards (API keys leaking / Security shaky / Wallet on fire) each with 'ISSUE' tag; kinetic 'Not great.'
'Dispatch fixes all of it.'; cream chat card (orange bubble) on top + 2 green-bordered solution rows (Runs on your machine / Asks before it acts) with green check badges. Green positive glow.
3 stacked punch-in words: 'SAFER.' (green) / 'CHEAPER.' (orange) / 'SMOOTHER.' (white), ~17f apart with scale-overshoot + glow.
'Drop [Claude] in comments' ('Claude' in orange-outlined chip) + 'like for the full setup guide.'; iPhone IG comment UI typing 'Cla|' + action icon row.
Stark Industries browser card animates in mid-frame (letterbox->grows); nav '● STARK / INDUSTRIES', HUD chrome 'TELEMETRY LINK · LIVE', Iron Man photo right, pull-quote. DARK + gold.
Full-width Stark mockup hero: in-mockup 'Build / with Devini' ('Devini' gold) left-aligned + 'PROTOCOL — MK LXXXV' kicker + Iron Man hero image; subtle parallax page-scroll.
Stark mockup scrolled to new hero state: 'I am / Iron Man.' ('Iron Man.' gold) + nanotech-suit subtitle; Iron Man image fills right with smoke.
Claude Code app icon + 'CLAUDE CODE' pill; 'Build Within An Hour' ('Hour' orange) + sub 'using a custom-created Claude Skill'. Switches gold->Claude orange.
'Want this website's full code?' ('code?' orange) + 'THE ENTIRE SKILL PACK'; 3 engagement cards (Like / Follow / Comment green with 'AI' tag).
Cards flip to ACTIVE state (Liked red / Following / Comment green); bio pill '▶ Full tutorial @DeviniLabs' + orange filled 'Like, Follow & Comment AI' button pulsing.
Brand-lockup intro: Stitch + Claude 'AI' lockup; 'plug Stitch / into Claude Code' ('Claude Code' orange) left-aligned + sub-kicker + pink kinetic 'this changes everything.' DARK pink/orange.

Gradient headline 'Gemini 3.1' (blue->purple->pink) + two dark cards (Claude Code / Antigravity, green READY pills) + terminal block '$ claude plugin install stitch' / '✓ installed — ready to design'.
'● STITCH · LIVE DEMO'; chat/terminal mockup card with blue glowing border, 'I've generated three visual directions' + numbered list; lower-third 'FEATURE 01/03 — prompt a full website'.
Three website mockup thumbnails in a row (editorial / cinema / purple-gradient); lower-third 'FEATURE 03/03 — drop a URL -> redesign / Nano Banana 2'.
'a GitHub repo packed with skills' (pink); realistic GitHub repo browser mockup with pink 'SKILLS FOLDER' callout arrow + 3 stat chips (4.7K STARS / 43 WATCHING / 560 FORKS); kinetic 'magic'.
'one palette. every surface.' (pink); 'SHARED PALETTE' dot-row pill + 2x2 UI mockup cards (Pricing/FAQ/Dashboard/Onboarding) with rainbow top-borders wiping in Z-order.
'3 concepts -> pick 1 -> 8 pages'; 3 concept swatch cards (Monograph selected, pink dashed highlight + check) + 8-page card grid (2x4) with rainbow top-borders cascading.
'SOLO FOUNDERS / just got a / design team.' ('design team.' glowing pink); outlined pill CTA '📄 want the full setup guide?' with orange glow.
OpenAI logomark in teal gradient rounded-square; giant 'GPT 5.5' + teal 'JUST DROPPED' + subtitle + date pill '● APR 23 · 2026'. DARK teal.
'GPT-5.5 leads. Across the board.' (teal); rotated 'STATE OF THE ART' badge + Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index browser card with multi-series line chart drawing on L-R.
Transition-breather: empty dark bg + grid + teal radial glow only (no text), ~1-2s gap.
Model list precursor: rows with teal check icons fade in one-by-one top->bottom, cascading ~6-8f apart.

'Five jobs. One model.' (teal); 5 stacked rounded rows each with teal monoline icon + bold title + teal sub-caption (Write/debug code, Research online, Analyze data, Docs/sheets, Operate software). CLEANEST cascade.
Greg Brockman quote: large teal '❝' mark + 'A faster, sharper thinker for fewer tokens.' + attribution 'Greg Brockman / PRESIDENT · OPENAI' with teal left-border.
'Trust the loop.'; 4-step numbered vertical stepper (01 Plan / 02 Use tools active teal-glow / 03 Check / 04 Keep going dim) with connecting line drawing + progressive activation.
'Same speed. Better everything.' (teal); 4 metric cards each with two horizontal bars (GPT-5.4 grey / GPT-5.5 teal) growing L-R + delta pill (IDENTICAL / +42% / -38% / -65%).
'Capability up. Cost down.'; 3 small cards CAPABILITY (teal up-arrow) / SPEED (gold equals) / COST (teal down-arrow) pop up L-R with glyph animating.
Benchmark data-table card (GPT-5.5 column bolded across rows Terminal-Bench/Expert-SWE/GPQA/etc); rows reveal top->bottom; kinetic subtitle 'That's rare.' (teal glow).
Split band ANTHROPIC/Mythos (orange) vs OpenAI/shipping GPT-5.5 (teal); burned caption with red-underlined 'Mythos'; outro title 'OPENAI PICKED A / SHARPER MOMENT.' (teal gradient glow).

Full-bleed 16:9 browser screen-capture of a 3D-scroll cosmic website (black-hole/accretion-disk, glowing iris, nebula card grid) + rounded webcam PiP bottom-right; scroll-driven section reveals. DARK orange.
Anthropic burst-star glyph in clay-orange rounded-square + 'CLAUDE CODE' outlined pill; screen-capture demoted to lower third behind.

'Want this website's full code?' ('code?' orange) + 'THE ENTIRE SKILL PACK'; 3 stacked rows animating Like->Liked (red) / Follow->Following (orange) / Comment types 'AI' (green); YouTube + orange CTA pills.
Return to full-bleed screen-capture finale scrolling the cosmic website; webcam PiP may drop; final hold on glowing orange black-hole hero rotating.
HOOK: browser card 'claude.ai/design' with 'WEEKLY LIMIT REACHED' + 'You've hit your Claude Design quota.' + red laser strikethrough sweep across the headline. DARK orange.
'THE FIX' kicker + giant left-aligned 'One open-source repo.' ('open-source' orange), word-group slide-up build. CLEANEST DARK two-tone title-card.
'★ NEW · OPEN SOURCE' pill + giant 'HUASHU / DESIGN.' lockup (period orange) + Chinese subtitle + github lockup card 'alchaincyf/huashu-design' with tag chips.

'AGENT-AGNOSTIC — Drop it into any coding agent.' ('any' orange); center 'huashu-design SKILL' chip + 2x2 brand-logo cards (Claude Code orange / Cursor / Codex teal / OpenClaw) each tinted with real brand icon; footnote '+ OPENCLAW · HERMES'. CLEANEST brand-logo feature-grid.

'ONE-LINE INSTALL'; dark terminal card '~/projects · zsh', '# one line. all 20 skills.' + '$ npx skills add alchaincyf/huashu-design' + orange progress bar fills L-R -> green '✓ installed · 20 skills · 0 errors'; bottom subtitle 'No buttons. No panels.' CLEANEST DARK $-command terminal.
'UNDER THE HOOD'; giant orange '20' left-aligned + 2-line label 'design philosophies, baked in.'; large browser preview card auto-scrolling a long live-preview document with '● REC'.

'ONE SKILL · FOUR DELIVERABLES — Type once. Ship anything.' ('anything.' orange); 2x2 numbered deliverable cards (01 INTERACTIVE Prototypes / 02 HTML->PPTX Slide Decks / 03 TIMELINE Motion / 04 PRINT-GRADE Infographics) Z-order stagger.

'THREE VARIANTS · TWEAKS PANEL — Three options. Pick one. Or tweak.'; 3 tilted variant cards (Editorial cream / Brutalist dark / Soft light) + './TWEAKS' panel with 3 sliders (Hue/Density/Type Scale) animating to values.
Mid-section: multiple browser/preview scrolling mockup cards showcasing the repo (GUI vs terminal honest take), dark chassis, orange tag chips.

'THE HONEST TAKE — Replace it fully? Probably not.'; VS layout: left cream GUI card 'CLAUDE DESIGN · GUI' vs right dark terminal card 'HUASHU · TERMINAL' + circular orange 'VS' badge centered; kinetic 'closes the gap fast.'
'● DROP A COMMENT'; 'Comment' label + GIANT orange 'AI' + '-> I'll send the repo + a starter prompt.' + github lockup bar 'github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design'.
'Before you open / Claude Code / again,' (two-tone by weight, grey->near-black); white frosted card mockup below; lines fade+rise top-down. LIGHT blue mesh.
'Claude Code reads your entire codebase…' centered multi-line near-black body with one accent-blue phrase, word-group reveal; small frosted info cards below.
GIANT 'Graphify.' wordmark (period accent) scales in + blue underline wipe L-R. Mesh bg.
Graph metrics: frosted white cards in a vertical list each with icon + label + number (27,360 / 34,991 / 35,000) and small bar sparklines growing from 0.
'04 — HERE'S THE TRICK — It doesn't re-read files. It navigates the graph.' ('navigates' blue); DARK code mockup card 'Using graph.json with an LLM' inset in light frame, code lines type-reveal.
GIANT two-tone number with blue 'x' suffix ('0x' -> count), near-black digits, blue 'x', scale overshoot.
'05 — THE MATH'; GIANT '71x' (near-black 71, blue ×) + label 'fewer tokens per query'; two equation cards '$20 per month = $100 of throughput' slide in to center '='.
'Not just code. / It's actually working.' centered two-line near-black/blue kinetic, accent word blue on landing; small frosted chips below.
'Comment' grey + giant 'AI' (blue/black two-tone) + subtitle grey; footer pill '● @ABHISHEK.DEVINI'.

'01 — MEET YOUR DOCK BUDDIES'; desktop mockup card (macOS screen, 3D character on a dock of app icons) fades+scales in; kinetic subtitle 'tiny Claude agents.' (gradient last word). LIGHT gradient mesh.
'02 — THEY JUST VIBE'; 'they're just up there / vibing.' (GIANT gradient blue->purple->pink); two chat bubbles + colorful dock/swatch bar mockup.
'03 — WHAT IT IS'; 'it's called' label + GIANT 'lil / agents.' lockup ('agents.' gradient) + sub 'TINY AI COMPANIONS FOR YOUR DOCK' + credit card 'BUILT BY · Ryan Stephen'.
'04 — FULLY OPEN'; GIANT gradient '$0' + label 'FOREVER, NO CATCH'; two list-row cards (OPEN SOURCE · MIT / MIT LICENSE · FREE) with green dots.
Character mockup cards (purple-bg, 3D character poses) fan in L-R; kinetic word 'fun.' gradient accent.
Centered grey lead-in + GIANT gradient 'peaceful.'; mockup card below.
Frosted browser/app preview cards with scrolling content + small character + floating squares ('fun.' continued).
'07 — PLAYFUL UX'; 'while it thinks, / it talks back.'; center gradient app-icon emblem with concentric ring pulse + notification chip '● done! PLAYS A LITTLE SOUND'.
'08 — PRIVACY FIRST'; shield emblem card + 'YOUR DATA STAYS' + GIANT '100% local' (blue/purple gradient) + 3 '0' stat cards (NO SIGNUP / NO TRACKING / NO CLOUD).
Frosted data-table card (rows of metrics/columns) fades up, rows reveal top-down; floating squares.
'09 — BUT THIS'; pink heart icon + 'but this guy made it / alive.' ('alive.' gradient blue->pink->peach) + sub 'A LITTLE BUDDY ON YOUR SCREEN'.
'Comment' grey + giant quoted 'AI' (purple) + 'and I'll DM you the resources.'; footer pill '● @ABHISHEK.DEVINI'.
Pixel-art Claude mascot icon + '● FREE · FOREVER' pill + 'RUN CLAUDE CODE' overline + giant ALL-CAPS 'FREE / FOREVER'. DARK amber.
'● OPEN SOURCE'; kinetic word-by-word 'A developer just dropped this on GitHub'; dark terminal card 'free-claude-code — zsh', '$ gh repo clone ...' + file-tree lines typing (router.py amber).
'● TRACTION'; BIG STAT '22,000+' white framed by corner-brackets + label '★ GITHUB STARS'; number pops scale 0.9->1.

'It quietly reroutes Claude Code to free AI models' ('reroutes' amber); routing diagram: left fan of glowing nodes + lines converging right into a single ringed hub node; bracketed pill 'WITHOUT BREAKING ANYTHING'.
'● LIVE'; kinetic 'Your terminal still thinks it's talking to Anthropic' ('Anthropic' coral); GitHub repo browser mockup (file list, sidebar, README) scroll-pans to quick-start.

'● THE SWITCHBOARD'; Claude Code node card + ghost Anthropic card + central switch node (⇄ ring); expands to 3 model cards (DeepSeek / Kimi K2 / GLM) connected by drawing lines; kinetic 'redirected to a free model' ('free' green).
'● THE BEST PART'; 'SAME EXPERIENCE' + giant two-line 'ZERO / COST' (amber-gold with glow bloom).
'You don't need to be a developer'; instruction card 'THE ONLY STEP -> Grab a free key & paste it in' + inset code field '$ API_KEY=sk-••••' + brand chips (NVIDIA NIM / OpenRouter).
'● ↓ DO THIS'; chat-bubble icon + giant ALL-CAPS 'COMMENT "AI"' + sub 'and I'll send the setup file + the repo link'.
Outro: '✳ Claude' wordmark + kinetic 'Made in minutes with a custom Claude skill' + circular rotating badge 'FREE CLAUDE CODE · DARK GLASS · DEVINI LABS' with amber ring tracing in.
Anthropic burst icon (radiating coral spokes) + '● ANTHROPIC · NEW RELEASE' pill + giant 'OPUS / 4.8' + italic 'is finally here.' + 2nd pill 'THE FULL RUNDOWN · UNDER A MINUTE'. DARK.
'● THE BENCHMARK KING'; BIG STAT '#1' + rising-bars graphic (4 bars increasing, last white-glow); kinetic 'The most capable model anyone's shipped' ('capable' amber).
'● BENCHMARKS'; data-table card columns Opus 4.8 (highlighted col) / Opus 4.7 / GPT-5.5 / Gemini 3.1; rows Agentic coding/Terminal/Reasoning/Computer use/Knowledge; column tint wipe + rows reveal.
'● HONESTY'; balance-scale icon + BIG STAT '4' morphs to '4×' (× slides in) + label 'MORE HONEST THAN 4.7'; code-comment card with strikethrough on '✗ I'm confident this is right.'

'● ACCURACY'; concentric-ring radar/target graphic (amber highlight ring + center dot) + giant 'FIRST TRY' + 3 green-check chips (Less fixing/Less nudging/Right the first time) + italic '…far more often.'
'● ALIGNMENT'; 'Misaligned behavior ↓ lower is better' bar chart (Sonnet 4.6 / Mythos green / Opus 4.7 / Opus 4.8 white-glow) with value labels counting up above bars.
'● BACKBONE'; 'It won't just nod along to keep you happy.' ('nod' amber); user message bubble (right) + Opus reply card with orange glow border '✳ OPUS 4.8 / ⚠ That'll drop user data...'
'● WHAT'S NEW'; 'Three new features dropped.' ('Three' amber); 1 highlighted orange-glow card 'THE STANDOUT / Dynamic Workflows' + 2 dimmed numbered cards (02 / 03).
'● DYNAMIC WORKFLOWS'; constellation: central ringed node '✳ 1 SESSION' (coral) with dozens of orbiting dots spraying outward along spokes; BIG STAT '100+' + label 'SUBAGENTS · ONE SESSION'.

'● ONE MORE THING'; 'CLAUDE' overline + GIANT 'MYTHOS' (lavender gradient glow) over dark circle + floating lavender dots; bracketed pill 'ROLLING OUT IN THE COMING WEEKS' + italic '…to everyone.' Palette switches orange->lavender.
'● WANT THE FULL ANNOUNCEMENT?'; giant 'OPUS' + dark input field typing 'Opus' with amber blinking caret + white CTA button 'COMMENT "OPUS" ->' + sub '…and I'll fire the link over.'
'● ATTENTION'; two-tone 'Every reel on my profile' ('Every' orange) word-by-word pop. LIGHT mesh, floating squares drifting.
'● BUILT WITH'; large orange Anthropic burst icon + kinetic 'one custom claude skill' (blur->sharp word-by-word).
'● 2 WEEKS · ORGANIC'; big-stat counter starts slashed '0' counts up 9,778 -> 10,000 (strong ease-out ~54f); label 'one supporter'.
'● INTRODUCING'; white rounded lockup card with orange burst icon + wordmark 'Reel Stack' ('Stack' orange) reveal L-R + label 'A CLAUDE CODE SKILL'.
'● PICK A STYLE'; phone frame glassmorphic mockup, '● GLASS' chip + Anthropic icon + 'Multimodal / without the demo.' + preset row 'PRESET — GRAPHIFY / Glass family 1080×1920' + pagination dots.
'● YOUR VOICE'; mic icon + waveform of rounded bars alternating orange/lavender springing up L-R then idle-oscillate; label 'VOICEOVER.WAV'.
'● LINT'; 'Catches breaks before you ever hit post' ('post' lavender); frosted lint card '/REELSTACK-LINT SRC/LAUNCH.TSX · 3 ERRORS' + error rows with orange ✗ circles revealing.
'● FOUNDATION'; dark code-editor card on light bg, 'src/ReelStack.tsx · REACT', syntax-highlighted Remotion code (import Audio/Sequence, <Hook/><Reveal/><Proof/>) typing line-by-line.
'● DIRECT PORT · SHIPPED REEL'; BIG STAT '22' + chip-cloud of frosted pill chips (graphify, paperclip, gstack, lilagents, jcode, claudewatch...) spraying in across two rows.
'● DIRECT PORTS'; 'Reels I already shipped.' ('shipped' lavender); phone frame slides in from left showing 'It's called / Graphify.' + parallax tilt.

'● WANT IT?'; giant 'Comment AI.' ('AI.' orange) + sub 'I'll DM you the link.'; 3 pastel action tiles (LIKE peach / FOLLOW mint / AI COMMENT lavender) + brand lockup '✳ Reel Stack · A CLAUDE CODE SKILL · DEVINI LABS'.
Glass browser panel (Claude new-chat): orange Claude burst-asterisk + 'Claude' wordmark + lavender input ghost-bar + mic/wave chip + peach send button pulsing. LIGHT iridescent mesh.
'● STEPS · 01 -> 03'; card 01 (Claude mini-browser, amber focus-ring) slides in left + card 02 (assets: voiceover.wav / script.txt) slides in right, mouse cursor glides between.
'● Q · 01 / 04'; transcription mockup: FRAME 0417 counter card + multicolor waveform + 4 caption rows (00:12.68 -> f0380 | But ...) + scrub timeline 'WHISPER-CLI'; subtitle 'drift?'
'● Q · 02 / 04'; three fanned polaroid clip cards (CLIP 01 mint / CLIP 02 lavender / front MY CLIP peach +) fan out from a stacked deck; subtitle '+ my clips'.
'● Q · 04 / 04'; DARK inset macOS terminal '#14161C' with install log (npm install -g, Password:, retrying...) + stacked system permission modals popping in; subtitle 'setup hell · ⊘'.
'● THE ANSWER — WE GOT YOU'; 4-quadrant recap dashboard card (AUDIO+VIDEO / YOUR CLIPS / DESIGN / SETUP), each quadrant pops in clockwise with green ✓ stamp; footer 'ALL COVERED · 4/4'.
'● Q · 03 / 04'; big tablet card 'DESIGN · SYSTEM v4.2' with 3 descending 'Aa' type specimens cascading in L-R + faint spec text.
'● OUTPUT'; giant numeral '5' near-black with diagonal lavender mesh streak wiping behind; side labels 'WEEK / AFTERNOON'.
Glass circle badge containing numeral '7' + 'DAYS'; kinetic subtitle '/ 1 afternoon' (the '1' lavender accent), cross-fades from previous '5'.
'● no plugins'; 2x3 glass icon tiles (⊕ ⊗ ◉ / ⬡ ⬣ ⊠) stagger-pop in reading order + a diagonal mint->amber gradient line drawing across corner-to-corner; subtitle 'just reels'.
'● THE CALL TO ACTION'; 'COMMENT' + sub 'AND I'LL DM YOU THE KIT'; comment input bar typing 'A I |' + Post button; phone-mockup rises with devini DM + tail card 'Prompt it. / Post it.'

Dark browser window 'devin1.io/tea', dashed amber border; hero video: backlit hanging teabag with golden volumetric glow + serif 'Devini' gold wordmark; cross-dissolve to hands cradling glowing tea cup. DARK amber, video-led.
Amber-outlined dark pill '● THE COMPLETE BUILD' fades+drops above the browser card, amber dot igniting.
'● TO GET IT ALL'; 'Comment one word' (white) + ↓ chevron bouncing; dark comment input bar 'D' avatar + typing 'A |' + amber paper-plane send icon.
'➤ Straight to your DMs'; 2x2 feature tiles (Tutorial video ▶ / Source code <> / Assets / Prompt guide) amber-outline glow, cascade TL->TR->BL->BR with icon fading 2f after.
'● YOUR TURN'; two-tone 'Want your own build / like this?' ('your own build' amber tint-sweep white->amber L-R).
Two-tone 'Let's build it / together.' ('together.' amber) + gold divider line draws center-out + serif 'Devini' gold lockup + handle '@DEVINILABS'.
